title: taraxacum lilianae
intro: Taraxacum lilianae, also known as Lillian's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum lilianae include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
